scenarios.prompt: Prepare a preview clip and poster from one portrait source video.
Prepare a preview clip and poster from one landscape source video.
Process a directory with mixed portrait and landscape videos and generate a manifest.
assertions: all valid inputs are inspected before export
portrait and landscape outputs are routed to the correct folders
manifest contains one row per processed source
existing outputs are skipped unless force is passed

scenarios.prompt: Run the tool with a corrupted file or without ffmpeg available.
assertions: missing ffmpeg or ffprobe returns actionable blocker
tool does not pretend work succeeded when dependencies are absent
